prerequisites: An active Infor Nexus account on your company's instance, with API access enabled by your Infor Nexus administrator.

Connection credentials issued by your Infor Nexus administrator: an access key ID (access_key_id), user ID (user_id), data key (api_key), and secret access key (secret_key). Infor Nexus authenticates API calls using hash-based message authentication (HMAC) built from these values.
The base URL for your Infor Nexus instance (base_url), corresponding to your account's subdomain or endpoint.
The name of the Infor Nexus dataset you want to extract (dataset_name).

authMethods.name: HMAC (access key ID, user ID, data key, and secret key)
authMethods.summary: Infor Nexus authenticates API requests with hash-based message authentication (HMAC). Supply the access_key_id, user_id, api_key (data key), and secret_key config fields. These four values are used to sign each request; the connector reaches your instance at the configured base_url. Contact your Infor Nexus administrator to obtain all four credentials.

setupSteps.title: Request API credentials from your Infor Nexus administrator
setupSteps.body: Infor Nexus does not let end users self-generate API credentials. Contact your Infor Nexus administrator and request the four values needed for HMAC authentication: the access key ID, your user ID, the data key, and the secret access key. Also confirm the base URL or subdomain for your Infor Nexus instance.

setupSteps.title: Enter the connection credentials
setupSteps.body: Set access_key_id to your access key ID, user_id to your Infor Nexus user ID, api_key to your data key, and secret_key to your secret access key. These are the credentials Infor Nexus uses to compute the HMAC signature for each API call.

setupSteps.title: Set the instance base URL
setupSteps.body: Set base_url to the endpoint of your Infor Nexus instance (the subdomain for your account). This determines which Infor Nexus environment the connector queries.

setupSteps.title: Choose the dataset to extract
setupSteps.body: Set dataset_name to the Infor Nexus dataset you want to pull. Optionally set mode if you need to control the extraction behavior; leave it unset to use the default.

setupSteps.title: Verify the connection
setupSteps.body: Run the connection check. A successful response confirms the HMAC credentials, base_url, and dataset_name are valid. If it fails, re-confirm the access key ID, user ID, data key, secret key, and subdomain with your Infor Nexus administrator.

sources.title: Infor Nexus - Amazon AppFlow User Guide (requirements and connection fields: access key ID, user ID, secret access key, data key, subdomain; HMAC authentication)
Infor Nexus Developer Network - Integration API (authentication choices: SessionToken, HMAC, OAuth2)
Infor Nexus Developer Network - Use of Data Key
